---

import MethodEndpoint from "@theme/ApiExplorer/MethodEndpoint";
import ParamsDetails from "@theme/ParamsDetails";
import RequestSchema from "@theme/RequestSchema";
import StatusCodes from "@theme/StatusCodes";
import OperationTabs from "@theme/OperationTabs";
import TabItem from "@theme/TabItem";
import Heading from "@theme/Heading";

<Heading
  as={"h1"}
  className={"openapi__heading"}
  children={"Authorize payment"}
>
</Heading>

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"post"}
  path={"/my/contracts/{contractNumber}/payments/{paymentId}/authorize"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



Authorize payment within given contract.

Possible error codes explanation:
| Error status code | Code     | Explanation                                                                                       |
| --- | ---                    | ---                                                                                               |
| 404 | RESOURCE_NOT_FOUND     | Resource could not be found                                                                       |
| 422 | NOT_AUTHORIZED         | Incorrect OTP                                                                                     |
| 422 | NOT_AUTHORIZED_BLOCKED | Limit of attempts for payment authorization exceeded, another attempts temporarily blocked        |
| 422 | OTP_EXPIRED            | Validity of OTP expired                                                                           |
| 422 | ALREADY_AUTHORIZED     | Already authorized                                                                                |
| 500 | INTERNAL_SERVER_ERROR  | Internal failure                                                                                  |

> All 4XX status codes responses can be optionally extended by authorization attribute `blockedUntil` - all requests for another payment (OTP) initialization will be refused until this time

<Heading
  id={"request"}
  as={"h2"}
  className={"openapi-tabs__heading"}
  children={"Request"}
>
</Heading>

<ParamsDetails
  parameters={[{"name":"contractNumber","in":"path","description":"Number of the contract client wants to make a payment from.","required":true,"example":"123456789","schema":{"type":"string"}},{"name":"paymentId","in":"path","description":"Payment ID obtained during initialization","required":true,"example":"A11223344","schema":{"type":"string"}}]}
>
  
</ParamsDetails>

<RequestSchema
  title={"Body"}
  body={{"content":{"application/json; charset=utf-8":{"schema":{"anyOf":[{"type":"object","properties":{"smsAuthorization":{"type":"object","properties":{"key":{"type":"string","description":"Payment verification key (it is known only to application)"},"code":{"type":"string","description":"Payment OTP - code sent through SMS"}},"required":["key","code"],"description":"Authorization info for SMS (OTP) authorization type"}},"required":["smsAuthorization"],"example":{"smsAuthorization":{"key":"011173bc-13d8-4467-a096-b8680b122fc3","code":"12345"}}},{"type":"object","properties":{"smsAuthorization":{"type":"object","properties":{"key":{"type":"string","description":"Payment verification key (it is known only to application)"},"code":{"type":"string","description":"Payment OTP - code sent through SMS"}},"required":["key","code"],"description":"Authorization info for SMS (OTP) authorization type"}},"required":["smsAuthorization"],"example":{"smsAuthorization":{"key":"011173bc-13d8-4467-a096-b8680b122fc3","code":"12345"}}},{"type":"object","properties":{"smsAuthorization":{"type":"object","properties":{"key":{"type":"string","description":"Payment verification key (it is known only to application)"},"code":{"type":"string","description":"Payment OTP - code sent through SMS"}},"required":["key","code"],"description":"Authorization info for SMS (OTP) authorization type"}},"required":["smsAuthorization"],"example":{"smsAuthorization":{"key":"011173bc-13d8-4467-a096-b8680b122fc3","code":"12345"}}}]}}}}}
>
  
</RequestSchema>

<StatusCodes
  id={undefined}
  label={undefined}
  responses={{"200":{"description":"Payment authorized and is being processed","headers":{},"content":{"application/json;charset=UTF-8":{"schema":{"type":"object","required":["paymentId"],"properties":{"paymentId":{"type":"string","example":"A11223344","description":"Payment ID"}},"title":"Payment"},"examples":{"response":{"value":{"paymentId":"A11223344"}}}}}},"404":{"description":"Not Found","headers":{},"content":{"application/json;charset=UTF-8":{"schema":{"allOf":[{"type":"object","required":["errors"],"properties":{"errors":{"type":"array","items":{"type":"object","required":["code","message","severity"],"properties":{"code":{"type":"string","example":"ERR_1000_SOME_ERROR_CODE","description":"unique internal error code"},"message":{"type":"string","example":"Some error/validation message description","description":"human readable error description (non-localized)"},"severity":{"type":"string","enum":["ERROR","WARN","INFO"]},"attribute":{"type":"string","example":"personalBirthNumber","description":"json path of request attribute that caused the error (if applicable)"},"ticketId":{"type":"string","example":"UAT1:AMS:20160516-091658.450:45e4","description":"internal ticket ID, used for error backtracking"}},"title":"Error"}}},"title":"Errors"},{"type":"object","properties":{"authorization":{"type":"object","properties":{"blockedUntil":{"type":"string","example":"2017-01-18T10:34:44+01:00","description":"requested operation is blocked until specified time"}},"title":"Authorization"}}}]},"examples":{"response":{"value":{"errors":[{"code":"ERR_1000_SOME_ERROR_CODE","message":"Some error/validation message description","severity":"ERROR","attribute":"personalBirthNumber","ticketId":"UAT1:AMS:20160516-091658.450:45e4"}],"authorization":{"blockedUntil":"2017-01-18T10:34:44+01:00"}}}}}}}}}
>
  
</StatusCodes>
